zh.lifeSummary: 當Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan於大約1270年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根時，他的父親Llewelyn ap Cynfrig74歲，母親Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan73歲。他與Catrin ferch Hopkin結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1338年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan于大约1270年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根时，他的父亲Llewelyn ap Cynfrig74岁，母亲Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan73岁。他与Catrin ferch Hopkin结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1338年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Llewelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llywellyn

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan was born about 1270, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Llewelyn ap Cynfrig, was 74 and his mother, Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan, was 73. He married Catrin ferch Hopkin. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died after 1338.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan est né environ 1270, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Llewelyn ap Cynfrig, avait 74 ans et sa mère, Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan, avait 73 ans. Il a épousé Catrin ferch Hopkin. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1338.

de.lifeSummary: Als Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan um 1270 in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Llewelyn ap Cynfrig 74 und seine Mutter Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan 73. Er hat Catrin ferch Hopkin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1338.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan è nato il circa 1270 nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Llewelyn ap Cynfrig, aveva 74 anni e il suo madre, Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan, aveva 73 anni. Lui sposato Catrin ferch Hopkin. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1338.

ja.lifeSummary: Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorganが約1270年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父Llewelyn ap Cynfrigは74歳，母Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorganは73歳であった。Catrin ferch Hopkinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1338年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan(이)가 대략 1270년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Llewelyn ap Cynfrig(은)는 74세였고, 그의 어머니 Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan(은)는 73세였다. 그는 Catrin ferch Hopkin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1338년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Llewelyn ap Cynfrig, tinha 74 anos e sua mãe, Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan, tinha 73 anos. Ele casou-se com Catrin ferch Hopkin. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 1338.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan родился около 1270 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Llewelyn ap Cynfrig было 74 года, а матери, которую звали Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan, 73. Он женился на женщине по имени Catrin ferch Hopkin. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1338 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Llewelyn Fychan ap Llewelyn of Glamorgan nació aproximadamente 1270, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Llewelyn ap Cynfrig, tenía 74 años y su mamá, Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan, tenía 73 años. Se casó con Catrin ferch Hopkin. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1338.
